questionHtml: Using information from Table 2, sketch the change in Uruguay’s Lorenz curve from 2010 to 2015.
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who label diagrams incorrectly can be awarded a maximum of [1].

For the vertical axis, the label may be cumulative percentage of income or percentage of income. For the horizontal axis, the label may be cumulative percentage of population/households or percentage of population/households.

meta.title: Using information from Table 2, sketch the change in Uruguay’s Lorenz curve from 2010 to 2015.
breadcrumbLabels: 3.4.2 The meaning and measurement of economic inequality
